sentences.arabic: أَدَّى حَامِدٌ الزَّكَاةَ فِي نِهَايَةِ السَّنَةِ.
sentences.translation: Hamid je platio zekat na kraju godine.
sentences.translationEn: Hamid paid Zakat at the end of the year.

sentences.translation: Dao je dio svog imetka siromašnima.
sentences.translationEn: He gave a portion of his money to the poor.

sentences.translation: Nakon toga osjetio je spokoj i sreću.
sentences.translationEn: He felt peace and happiness after that.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ: الزَّكَاةُ تُطَهِّرُ الْمَالَ وَتُبَارِكُ فِيهِ.
sentences.translation: Rekao je: Zekat čisti imetak i donosi bereket.
sentences.translationEn: He said: Zakat purifies wealth and brings blessings to it.
